Our Founder

The Woman Behind the Journey

Certified IFA Aroma Care Practitioner
Balinese Belly Binding Specialist
Lactation Consultant
Prenatal & Postpartum Therapist
Psychology Background

Caitlyn

Founder · BeWellness Journey

Caitlyn founded Be Wellness Journey with a simple but deeply personal belief — that wellness is not a destination, but a lifelong journey.

As women, we move through many stages in life. We grow, we adapt, we nurture, we rebuild. From adolescence to motherhood, from career changes to personal transformation, our bodies and hearts carry every chapter with us. Caitlyn understands that these transitions are not only physical, but deeply emotional.

Trained as a Certified IFA Aroma Care Practitioner, Balinese Belly Binding Specialist, Lactation Consultant, and Prenatal & Postpartum Massage Therapist, and with a background in Psychology, Caitlyn approaches care holistically — supporting both the body and the mind.

Through therapeutic touch, aromatherapy, and mindful guidance, Caitlyn creates a space where women can slow down, reconnect with themselves, and restore inner and outer harmony. Be Wellness Journey is her way of walking alongside women — not only during milestones, but throughout the beautiful, complex journey of becoming.

Our Brands

A Wellness Ecosystem for Women

Each brand within BeWellness Journey is crafted to support a specific chapter of your life — together forming a complete circle of care.

ForMom Wellness

Prenatal & Postnatal Care

Specialised treatments honouring the journey of motherhood — from pregnancy through postpartum recovery. Rooted in Balinese and traditional Malay & Indonesian healing wisdom.
